## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally (typecheck + lint + test + build)
- [ ] New pure logic has unit tests (`*.test.ts`)
- [ ] Feature is **local-first** — no user files are uploaded for processing
- [ ] UI honestly states any format/operation limitations
- [ ] Heavy codecs/libraries are dynamically imported
